promoted_facts.fact: Accelerated royalties on termination — franchisee owes royalties through remainder of scheduled term even after termination
No force majeure clause in Franchise Agreement
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not explicitly in reader report — found during contract depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: Operations Manual is 205 pages covering 17 sections, with Computer Operations (50pp) and Training (73pp) as largest sections
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass C — referenced but not in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Bakery size requirement: 1,000 to 1,200 square feet, typically in retail strip malls
Opening timeline: 60-90 days from signing. Must open within 90 days or material breach
Franchise seller identities: Duane Carns and Kim Carns (from Receipt, Exhibit J)
Tolling provision on post-term noncompete — restricted period extended by duration of any violation
KDKC affiliate revenue from franchisee purchases in FY2024: $177,913.82
Revenue recognition: 70% of franchise fee recognized in year 1, 30% in years 2-5. Royalties at time of sale. Renewals when received. Transfers 100% at transfer.
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — from financial notes depth pass
